title: Set interface name same as parent interface name of the bridge
body:
When interface_name in containers.conf file is set to "parent", then set the interface names inside container same as the parent interface names of the respective bridges.

If the interface name is specified in the request, then that takes precedence.

Fixes: [#21313](https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/21313)

Signed-off-by: Vikas Goel <vikas.goel@gmail.com>
